seed_instruction: Write a story about a dropout who returns to school later in life to achieve their dreams.
org_constraint: Capitalize all instances of the word "DREAM" for emphasis.
new_constraint: The story must be written in lowercase, with no capitalized words.
instruction: Write a story about a dropout who returns to school later in life to achieve their dreams. Capitalize all instances of the word "DREAM" for emphasis. The story must be written in lowercase, with no capitalized words.
response: alex sat in the corner of the diner, staring at the menu, feeling the weight of twenty years of regret. he had left school before finishing high school, chasing a fleeting idea of freedom that quickly turned into a life of uncertainty. now, at thirty-five, he was ready to try again. he walked into the community college building, his heart pounding with a mix of fear and excitement. the first class he signed up for was creative writing, the very subject that had sparked his DREAM back in his youth. the professor looked at his application with a raised eyebrow but welcomed him with a warm smile. "it's never too late," she said, "as long as you believe in your DREAM." alex nodded, clutching his notebook. the days were long and the assignments were hard, but every time he struggled, he remembered why he started. he thought about the future he wanted to build, a future defined by his DREAM. months turned into years, and slowly, the doubt faded. he began to write stories that made people cry and laugh. one day, he received a call from a publisher who wanted to meet. alex stood in front of the mirror, adjusting his tie, feeling a surge of pride. he had done it. he had chased his DREAM and finally caught it.
